item.title: About Dataverse
item.description:
Who We Are

Dataverse is a Data & AI Engineering consultancy based in Sydney, Australia. We specialise in building intelligent, scalable data solutions that solve real-world business problems.

What We Do

We work at the intersection of modern data engineering and artificial intelligence — helping organisations move from raw data to actionable intelligence.

Our work spans:

  • Data Pipeline Architecture — scalable, reliable, cloud-native pipelines
  • AI Agent Development — intelligent automation using LangChain and OpenAI
  • Cloud Infrastructure — Google Cloud, Cloud Run, and serverless architectures
  • Data Platform Modernisation — migrating legacy systems to modern stacks

Our Approach

We believe in building production-grade systems from day one. Every solution we deliver is designed for reliability, observability, and scale.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get In Touch

Whether you have a project in mind, want to discuss a data or AI challenge, or just want to connect — we’d love to hear from you.

Email: hello@dataverse-ai.org

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/rajeshkancharla

Location: Sydney, Australia

We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

item.title: Services
item.description:
What Dataverse Offers

Data Engineering

Design and build robust data pipelines that move, transform, and serve data reliably at scale. From batch ETL to real-time streaming — we architect solutions that grow with your business.

  • Cloud-native pipeline development (GCP, AWS, Azure)
  • Data lakehouse architecture
  • ETL/ELT modernisation
  • Data quality and observability frameworks

AI & Agent Development

Build intelligent AI systems that automate complex workflows and augment human decision-making. We use the latest LLM frameworks to create production-ready AI agents.

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: Why I started writing and what you can expect here.

item.title: Why I Started Dataverse - And Who It's Really For
item.description: Large enterprises have dedicated consulting partners. Small businesses have spreadsheets. Dataverse is created to change that.
